---
title: "Bayes_modeling"
author: "Cheyenne Erickson"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
data <- X2019

```

The X matrix
```{r}
X <- model.matrix(~ `GDP per capita` +  + `Social support` +  + `Freedom to make life choices` + `Healthy life expectancy` + `Perceptions of corruption`, data = data)

Y <- data$Score
X
```
standirzie X's scale func to have mean 0 and var 1(normalization)

prior specifications
```{r}
MU <- c(0,0,0,0,0)
a <- .01 #or .001
b <- .01 #.001
g <- 5

```
